Class NullXMLStreamReader

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.databinding.utils.reader.NullXMLStreamReader
All Implemented Interfaces:
XMLStreamConstants, XMLStreamReader, Constants, ADBXMLStreamReader
public class NullXMLStreamReader extends Object implements ADBXMLStreamReader
